_meta.note: English source catalog. Keys prefixed by surface (dashboard/settings/debug/logs/updates/offline/modal/pin/backend/etc). Comments below each block trace dish-android source keys when present; entries marked 'review:' are web-only and need translator review.
offline.title: Server Unreachable
offline.message: Cannot connect to the Satellite server. It may be stopped or restarting.
offline.hint: Waiting for server… will reconnect automatically.
modal.restart.title: Restart to Install
modal.restart.body: Satellite will close and the new version %1$s will be installed in the background. The receiver will reconnect automatically when the new version launches.
modal.restart.warning: Active connections will be dropped during the restart.
backend.section.title: Backend
backend.guide.none.title: No remediation available
backend.guide.none.body: The server reported a state we don’t have copy for yet.
backend.vigem.title: ViGEmBus Driver
backend.vigem.err.driver-missing.title: ViGEmBus driver not detected
backend.vigem.err.driver-missing.body: ViGEmBus is a kernel driver that lets Satellite create a virtual Xbox 360 controller on Windows. Without it, controller input cannot be forwarded.
backend.vigem.err.driver-missing.step3: Restart may be required — check Device Manager under "System devices" for "Nefarius Virtual Gamepad Emulation Bus"
backend.vigem.err.driver-missing.step4: Refresh this page; status should show "Detected"
backend.vigem.err.bus-open-failed.title: ViGEmBus driver detected but unresponsive
backend.vigem.err.bus-open-failed.body: The driver is installed but Satellite could not open the bus. This usually means a version mismatch between the driver and the satellite build, or the driver service is stopped.
backend.vigem.err.bus-open-failed.step2: Or restart your machine and try again
backend.uinput.title: uinput Backend
backend.uinput.err.device-missing.title: /dev/uinput not found
backend.uinput.err.device-missing.body: The uinput kernel module ships with every mainline Linux kernel but may not be loaded right now. Without it, Satellite cannot create virtual gamepads.
backend.uinput.err.permission-denied.bod: /dev/uinput exists but the user running Satellite cannot write to it. Add a udev rule and join the input group.
backend.uinput.err.permission-denied.ste: Add yourself to the input group
Log out and back in for the group change to apply, then refresh this page
pin.section.title: Device Pairing
pin.hint.idle: Enter this PIN on the sender to pair. Expires in 5 minutes.
pin.hint.active: Enter this PIN on the sender to pair. Expires in %1$s.
pin.hint.expired: PIN expired — generate a new one to pair another device.
pin.hint.paired: Paired successfully — that PIN is now spent.
connections.section.title: Connections
controllers.section.title: Virtual Controllers
devices.section.title: Paired Devices
devices.touchpad.label: Touchpad
devices.touchpad.tip: Where this device's DualSense / DS4 touchpad is routed on this host. Set on the client (dish app); this dashboard reflects the current selection.
devices.touchpad.pad.tip: Forward the touchpad into the virtual DualShock 4 controller. PlayStation-type controllers only — an Xbox virtual pad has no touchpad surface.
devices.touchpad.mouse.tip: Use the touchpad as a relative mouse on this machine — finger 0 moves the cursor, the clicky pad is the left mouse button.
devices.touchpad.off.tip: Ignore touchpad input from this device.
devices.err.remove: Could not remove that paired device
motion.na.title: This controller has no gyroscope / accelerometer (IMU). Motion is not available for it — this is expected for Xbox-style pads.
motion.ready.title: The controller reports an IMU and the sender advertised motion support — waiting for the first motion packet.
motion.on.title: Gyro / accelerometer is streaming to the OS-level virtual gamepad.
motion.nosink.title: Gyro / accelerometer is being captured from the controller, but it is not delivered anywhere — this controller’s virtual device has no IMU surface to receive it (an Xbox-typed device, a ViGEmBus older than 1.22, or the macOS backend).
battery.na.title: This sender has not reported a battery level for this controller.
battery.charging.title: Battery %1$s — charging.
battery.full.title: Battery full.
battery.full.label: full
battery.wired.title: AC powered — a wired controller falls back to the host machine’s battery (100% on a desktop).
battery.discharging.title: Battery %1$s — discharging.
battery.unknown.title: Battery level %1$s (charging state unknown).
touchpad.off.title: Touchpad routing is turned off for this device — change it under Paired Devices.
touchpad.nosurface.title: Touchpad routing is set to "Pad", but this controller’s virtual device is not a DualShock 4 and has no touchpad surface — the samples are dropped. Switch this device to "Mouse" or "Off" under Paired Devices, or pair it as a PlayStation controller.
touchpad.ready.title: Touchpad samples will route to %1$s — none received yet.
touchpad.on.title: Touchpad input is streaming to %1$s.
lightbar.na.title: This controller has no addressable RGB lightbar — an Xbox pad, or a sender that did not advertise lightbar support. The host game’s colour is not forwarded to it.
lightbar.ready.title: The controller has an RGB lightbar and the sender accepts the lightbar return path — waiting for the host game to set a colour.
lightbar.on.title: The host game is driving this controller’s lightbar — current colour %1$s.
settings.udp-port.label: UDP Port
settings.udp-port.error: UDP port must be a whole number between 1024 and 65535.
settings.udp-port.rejected: Server rejected the UDP port — keeping %1$s.
settings.discovery.title: Discovery
settings.discovery.hint: mDNS / Bonjour is the modern discovery path and works on subnets that drop broadcast. The legacy UDP broadcast beacon stays on as a fallback for senders that predate the mDNS responder — turn it off only on a network where every sender supports mDNS.
settings.updates.title: Updates
updates.state.checking.title: Checking for updates…
updates.state.uptodate.title: Up to date
updates.state.available.title: Update available: v%1$s
updates.state.downloading.title: Downloading v%1$s…
updates.state.verifying.title: Verifying download…
updates.state.downloaded.title: Update v%1$s ready to install
updates.state.installing.title: Installing v%1$s…
updates.state.installing.detail: Satellite is restarting. This page will reconnect when the new version is ready.
debug.chart.title: Packet Rate History
debug.chart.hint: Updates every 500ms · showing last 60 samples (30 seconds)
logs.hint: Showing last 500 log entries · auto-refreshes every 2 seconds
